_comment: Machine-readable config for triage-sentry. AI: field/option ids are copied from triage-itsm/scripts/field_map.json (global Jira contexts — shared across ITSM and BAC). Keep them in sync. Sentry-specific config + BAC routing live below. Sentry auth + REST are handled by the `sentry` CLI (`sentry api`, `sentry issue ...`) — no token env var needed.
_routing_comment: BAC has no 'Pending development'/'Escalated' status — created bugs land in 'Open', which is exactly what auto-fix-next-bug selects. Differentiation is by AI: Agent Suitability + labels + priority, NOT status. Develop bugs keep their verdict suitability (only Agent-ready ones get auto-fixed). Escalations are forced to Human-only so the fixer skips them, tagged sentry-escalated, High priority; escalate_status is a best-effort transition (skipped if the status does not exist).
_sentry_status_comment: Sentry status changes use the first-class CLI commands. Archive = `sentry issue archive <id> --until auto` (unarchives on a spike = 'until escalating'). Silence-in-code = `sentry issue archive <id>` (forever). Resolve = `sentry issue resolve <id>`. Assign/priority/note/native-link go through `sentry api`.
